data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding IDOR on booking IDs.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the IDOR scenario on booking IDs, but the evidence provided does not include any specific tests or results related to this scenario. While there are prior steps that have passed, they do not directly address the IDOR vulnerability or provide concrete evidence of its validation. Therefore, the lack of relevant evidence leads to an inconclusive result regarding the validation of this persona scenario.
gaps: No evidence of IDOR scenario validation on booking IDs.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add IDOR validation tests
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define specific tests that simulate IDOR on booking IDs and capture the outcomes.
